description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

The convenience store service for issuing tax (non-taxable) and income certificates will be suspended from May 31 to June 2, 2026 (Reiwa 8) due to system maintenance and annual fiscal year updates.

Tax (non-taxable) and income certificates for fiscal year 2026 will be available starting June 3, 2026 (Wednesday).

If you need a certificate issued during the suspension period, please use one of the following:

• Hanno City Hall and each district administrative center (excluding Fujimi District Administrative Center)
9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.

• Hanno Station Service Counter
9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.
(Same-day issuance of tax certificates accepted from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/johosystem/13166.html
summary: ℹ️ Convenience store service for tax/non-taxable and income certificates suspended
